description: Code graph & blast-radius MCP for AI agents: change impact, dependents, health audit, clones.
name: io.github.sergii-ziborov/weavatrix

environmentVariables.description: Optional endpoint used only when online is enabled and sync_graph is called
environmentVariables.name: WEAVATRIX_SYNC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional bearer token for the configured graph sync endpoint
environmentVariables.name: WEAVATRIX_SYNC_TOKEN

packageArguments.description: Absolute path to the initial Git repository (the offline open_repo tool can explicitly switch repositories)
Full comma-separated set replacing the default; allowed groups are graph,search,source,health,build,retarget,online (omit retarget to pin one repository; add online only for network tools)
